description_long: This object is a large, rectangular stone block composed of three main stone segments bound together by thick, rust-colored metal bands. The stone surfaces are rough and gray, with visible texturing and some rivet details on the end faces, suggesting industrial fabrication. The metal bands wrap around the block at regular intervals, providing structural reinforcement and a contrasting color. The ends of the block are flat, with one side featuring two rectangular indents, possibly for handling or lifting. The overall appearance is utilitarian and robust, suitable for use as a heavy-duty barrier or obstacle in an urban environment. The block's size and construction imply it is designed to be immovable and to withstand significant force.
description: A large, gray stone block reinforced with rust-colored metal bands, featuring rough surfaces and industrial details. Its robust, segmented design makes it ideal as a heavy-duty urban barrier.
description_view_0: Front view shows the flat stone face with two rectangular indents and the metal bands wrapping around the sides.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the three stone segments and the three prominent metal bands encircling the block.
description_view_2: Rear view displays a flat, riveted metal face with no indents, emphasizing the industrial construction.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the segmented stone and metal bands, with a small cylindrical foot visible at the base.
attribute_location_context: urban street or construction site as a vehicle or pedestrian barrier
attribute_installation_method: placed directly on pavement or ground, possibly craned into position
attribute_weathering_pattern: Some surface roughness and discoloration on the stone and metal, suggesting moderate exposure to the elements but no significant erosion or moss.
attribute_integration_with_surrounding_s: aligned in a row or series to form a continuous barrier
